overall.description: First-person exploration footage from a game engine, showing a steady walk along a sunlit mountain trail. The camera moves through rocky terrain with scattered pine trees and wildflowers under a bright blue sky, transitioning from open vistas to a narrower rocky canyon.

scene_state.functional_zone: open mountain trail with scattered pines and wildflowers

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sunlit dirt trail, passing yellow wildflowers on the left

entered.detail: tall evergreen tree with dense foliage framing the left side of the view
distant mountain range with forested slopes under the bright sun
sandy brown path winding through the terrain with visible tire tracks
large reddish-brown rock formation rising on the right side
clusters of bright yellow flowers growing alongside the trail

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a bright, sunlit mountain trail with a large pine tree on the left and yellow wildflowers in the foreground. The camera moves forward along the dirt path toward a distant mountain ridge, with rocky outcrops visible on the right side.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding trail through rocky formations with scattered trees

events.description: trail curves right entering an area with larger rock formations and sparser vegetation

agents.ego_description: following the curving trail as it winds through rockier terrain with scattered pines

entered.detail: tall reddish rock wall rising on the left side of the trail
solitary tall pine tree standing on the ridge ahead

segments.scene_description: The trail curves to the right through rockier terrain, with the large pine tree passing out of view behind. Rocky canyon walls begin to rise on the left while the path winds toward a tall solitary pine in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow rocky canyon passage with steep walls

events.description: path narrows between tall rock walls forming a canyon-like passage

agents.ego_description: proceeding through the narrow rocky canyon as the trail winds between steep walls

entered.detail: steep rock face rising prominently on the right side of the narrow passage
rocky mountain peak visible through the canyon opening ahead

segments.scene_description: The trail enters a narrower rocky canyon with steep walls closing in on both sides. The path winds through the enclosed passage with rocky cliffs rising on the right, while a distant mountain peak becomes visible through the canyon opening ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a sunlit mountain trail that gradually narrows into a steep rocky canyon. It begins on a bright dirt path flanked by yellow wildflowers and a large pine tree, moving forward toward a distant mountain ridge. As the trail curves to the right, the open landscape shifts into rockier terrain where the pine tree fades from view and canyon walls begin to rise on the left. The scene then tightens as the path winds toward a solitary pine before entering a narrow passage with steep cliffs closing in on both sides. Finally, the camera moves through the enclosed rocky corridor, revealing a distant mountain peak through the canyon opening ahead.
